input: You know, like, write this in lowercase. My Dog Ate My Homework And I Swear It's True
ideal: my dog ate my homework and i swear it's true.

input: CAPITALIZE EVERYTHING. The server migration failed catastrophically and we need to roll back immediately
ideal: THE SERVER MIGRATION FAILED CATASTROPHICALLY AND WE NEED TO ROLL BACK IMMEDIATELY.

input: Um, type this in lowercase please. Congratulations On Your Promotion You Absolutely Deserve It
ideal: congratulations on your promotion you absolutely deserve it.

input: Make it all caps and show excitement. We finally shipped the feature after six months of grinding
ideal: WE FINALLY SHIPPED THE FEATURE AFTER SIX MONTHS OF GRINDING!

input: In lowercase. The API response time degraded to 800ms during peak traffic and triggered automatic scaling
ideal: the api response time degraded to 800ms during peak traffic and triggered automatic scaling.

input: Put that in all caps. I'm so proud of what we built together this year
ideal: I'M SO PROUD OF WHAT WE BUILT TOGETHER THIS YEAR.

input: You know, make it lowercase. The Customer Complained About The Delay But We Resolved It Quickly
ideal: the customer complained about the delay but we resolved it quickly.

input: The quarterly revenue exceeded projections by 14 percent. Can you capitalize everything?
ideal: THE QUARTERLY REVENUE EXCEEDED PROJECTIONS BY 14 PERCENT.

input: Type this in lowercase. My Daughter Graduated From Stanford Last June With Honors.
ideal: my daughter graduated from stanford last june with honors.

input: Um, make it all lowercase please. The CEO Announced A Merger With The Rival Startup Yesterday Morning.

input: Like, in lowercase. The Server Crashed At 2AM And Took Down The Entire Production Environment.
ideal: the server crashed at 2am and took down the entire production environment.

input: Capitalize everything. She said yes and now we're getting married in the spring!
ideal: SHE SAID YES AND NOW WE'RE GETTING MARRIED IN THE SPRING!

ideal: the intern fixed the bug that senior engineers couldn't solve for weeks.

ideal: I'M NEVER GOING BACK TO THAT RESTAURANT AGAIN.
